items.title: Prof. Zhu visited the Department of Geography at University of Wisconsin-Madison and gave a seminar talk
GeoDI Lab members attended the 2026 AAG Annual Meeting
items.description: GeoDI Lab members attended the 2026 American Association of Geographers (AAG) Annual Meeting held in San Francisco from March 17 to March 21, 2026.

items.title: Prof. Di Zhu Awarded the McKnight Land-Grant Professorship by the University of Minnesota
items.description: McKnight Land-Grant Professor 2026-2028The University of Minnesota has awarded Professor Di Zhu the McKnight Land-Grant Professorship.
